name: neruva-mcp
summary: MCP server for Neruva agent memory: typed Records, 5-engine knowledge graph, managed/BYO-LLM extraction, federated agent_remember/recall/context with question-type dispatch, Pearl's do-operator, HD analogy, concept blending, CBR, snapshot/restore for provable replay, quorum anomaly detection, fact invalidation, portable .neruva container. Drop-in for any MCP host (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI). LangChain / LangGraph / CrewAI adapters. Sub-100ms p95.
